dct_title_s: 1:250 000-scale map of Gulf Coast ecological inventory
dct_description_sm: produced by U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service, 1982.
"Base map prepared by U.S. Geological Survey."
Includes text, indexes of land and water species, and location map. Some maps include inset.

[NG-14-3]. Corpus Christi -- [NG-14-6]. Port Isabel -- [NG-17-4]. Charlotte Harbor -- [NG-17-5]. West Palm Beach -- [NG-17-8]. Miami -- [NG-17-11]. Key West -- [NH-14-9]. Brownsville -- [NH-15-10]. Tallahassee -- [NH-16-7]. Breton Sound -- [NH-16-9]. Apalachicola -- [NH-17-4]. Valdosta -- [NH-17-7]. Gainesville -- [NH-17-10]. Tarpon Springs.
